title: Volume 13 Premium Edition Illustration by Sadamoto
display_title: Volume 13 Premium Edition Illustration by Sadamoto
wikitext:
[]: Volume 13 Premium Edition Illustration by Sadamoto             Quote Post by Enigmaoppai » Sun Sep 13, 2015 9:41 pm Does anyone have/know where I could find the raw illustration used for the cover of the Volume 13 Premium Edition Box? (Without the text/title/etc.)

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Sep 13, 2015 10:10 pm Unless someone photoshops the words out, it probably won't happen until Sadamoto releases another illustration book, and I think you are going to have to wait a while for that.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Sep 14, 2015 1:55 am It's in the box - but as a 3D print which doesn't scan at a decent resolution.

[]:             Quote Post by Enigmaoppai » Mon Sep 14, 2015 11:31 am Yeah, I've heard about the holographic poster, hopefully get my copy by the end of October. Anyway, someone from /r/evangelion seems to have edited it!

[]:             Quote Post by Zeruss » Mon Sep 14, 2015 9:28 pm Yay!

Article: Volume 13 Premium Edition Illustration by Sadamoto
[]: Volume 13 Premium Edition Illustration by Sadamoto             Quote Post by Enigmaoppai » Sun Sep 13, 2015 9:41 pm Does anyone have/know where I could find the raw illustration used for the cover of the Volume 13 Premium Edition Box? (Without the text/title/etc.)

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Sep 13, 2015 10:10 pm Unless someone photoshops the words out, it probably won't happen until Sadamoto releases another illustration book, and I think you are going to have to wait a while for that.
